notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Juan Brito to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Leody Taveras out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser flies out sharply to center fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez grounds into a double play, third baseman Coby Mayo to shortstop Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. George Valera out at 2nd. Angel Martínez out at 1st.
